tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Topics to follow. Each becomes a Dev.to tag (and a Medium RSS feed).

maxAgeDays.title: Max age (days)
maxAgeDays.description: Only keep posts published within this many days. Tip: #womenintech/#pyladies are sparse — 30 keeps the feed full; set 7 for a strict 'this week'.

minReactions.title: Minimum reactions
minReactions.description: Drop Dev.to posts below this many reactions (Medium posts have no count and are always kept).

limit.title: Max items
limit.description: Maximum number of posts to save.
